title: Show multidimensional packed array indicies in VCD files
body:
Here's my SV `packed array`

```verilog
// dut.sv
module dut (....);
...
        logic [8-1:0][16-1:0] mem_a;
```
After verilator compilation I can see that it was flattened into 1 dimensional array
```c++
// obj_dir/dut.h
    VL_SIGW(dut__DOT__mem_a,127,0,4);
```

And the same in the VCD waveform
```
   $var wire 128 ( mem_a [127:0] $end
```

Is it possible to prevent array flattening and preserve dimensions after the Verilator?
